description:
You are on call as an operations engineer and have just been paged about a spike of critical errors that happened around 14:00 – 15:00 on 2023-07-15.  
A complete, unfiltered application log has already been copied to:

/home/user/logs/app.log

Your goal is to isolate only the ERROR and CRITICAL events that occurred on
2023-07-15 between 14:00:00 and 14:59:59 (inclusive) and save them in a
separate file so they can be attached to the incident ticket.

1. Create a new directory  
   /home/user/output  
   if it does not already exist.  (The script that will grade your work
   expects the directory to be present before the filtered file is created.)

2. Using a single regular-expression–based pipeline (2–3 commands chained
   together is fine), filter /home/user/logs/app.log so that only the lines
   satisfying both of the following conditions are *kept*:
   • The timestamp starts with the literal text “2023-07-15 14”  
     (this limits the hour to 14).  
   • The log-level field is either “ERROR” or “CRITICAL”.

3. Write the result to  
   /home/user/output/critical-2023-07-15.log

Output‐format requirements (checked by the grader):
• The file /home/user/output/critical-2023-07-15.log must exist when you are
  done.  
• It must contain **exactly** the matching lines, in their original order,
  with no leading/trailing blank lines and no extra characters.  
• Each line must end with a single newline character “\n”.  
• No other files should be placed in /home/user/output.

Once the file is created, you are finished.
truth:
Initial filesystem state (before the agent begins):

Directory /home/user/logs/ exists and contains exactly one file named
app.log with the following seven lines (each line ends with “\n” and nothing
else):

2023-07-15 13:59:58,123 INFO auth - User login successful: user_id=15
2023-07-15 14:00:02,456 ERROR db - Connection timeout to replica set
2023-07-15 14:05:34,789 WARNING cache - Cache miss for key=session_42
2023-07-15 14:15:03,101 CRITICAL api - Null pointer dereference in handler /api/data
2023-07-15 14:45:00,000 INFO scheduler - Task completed: daily_sync
2023-07-15 15:00:01,987 ERROR auth - Token expired for user_id=38
2023-07-15 15:05:22,333 INFO api - Request processed in 120ms

No /home/user/output directory exists yet.

Expected end state after the agent completes the task:

1. Directory /home/user/output/ exists (permissions 755 or more permissive).
2. File /home/user/output/critical-2023-07-15.log exists (permissions 644 or
   more permissive) and contains exactly these two lines, in this order,
   each terminated by one “\n” and nothing else:

2023-07-15 14:00:02,456 ERROR db - Connection timeout to replica set
2023-07-15 14:15:03,101 CRITICAL api - Null pointer dereference in handler /api/data

No additional files are created in /home/user/output or elsewhere.
